name: China Vered Financial Holding Corporation Limited
summary: China Vered Financial Holding Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, provides asset management, consultancy, financing, and securities advisory and brokerage services. It also provides insurance agency and money lending services. The company was formerly known as China Minsheng Financial Holding Corporation Limited and changed its name to China Vered Financial Holding Corporation Limited in July 2020. China Vered Financial Holding Corporation Limited is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
